text:
RESP_CARE_FAC_TXNMY_IND 
LONG NAME: RESP_CARE_FAC_TXNMY_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APR base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes 
COMMENT: 
This variable = 1 if PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS = “1” or “N” and the taxonomy code value is one of the 
following: 
385H00000X: Respite Care 
385HR2050X: Respite Care Camp 
385HR2055X: Respite Care, Mental Illness, Child 
385HR2060X: Respite Care, Mental Retardation and/or developmental disabilities 
385HR2065X: Respite Care,
